name: revit_place_family_on_face
description: Places a family instance on a host face using face-based, point-based, or line-based placement.

host_element_id.description: Element id of the host with the target face

location.description: XYZ point or curve endpoints on the face, depending on placement_type

notes: Bypass BasedTypeForm and PlaceFamilyInstanceForm; use FamilyInstanceCreator logic with explicit references.
